nodes.name: Turdoides
nodes.summary: Turdoides（Turdoides）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联19种鸟类，如Capuchin babbler、White-throated mountain babbler、Chapin's babbler等19种鸟类。

nodes.name: 海氏斑鸫鹛
nodes.summary: Hinde's babbler (Turdoides hindei), also known as Hinde's pied-babbler, is a species of bird in the family Leiothrichidae. It is endemic to Kenya. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist shrubland, arable land, and plantations. It is threatened by habitat loss. See also Wajee Nature Park References
